batches.name: Public operation/preflight/result qualification surfaces
batches.reason: Enables apps and agents to interact through governed public surfaces before deeper autonomy.

batches.name: Agent actorship and authority
batches.reason: Defines software-agent identity, sponsor accountability, and authority envelope.

batches.name: Agent run envelope, trace, and handoff
batches.reason: Prevents hidden agent session state and handoff-carried authority.

batches.name: Capability Manifest and AgentToolManifest
batches.reason: Requires agent actorship and run governance to make manifest semantics meaningful.

batches.name: World-model advisory runtime
batches.reason: Supports scenarios without creating a third twin or Compliance state.

batches.name: EvidenceNeed and ObservationRequest
batches.reason: Converts missing information into bounded farmer-usable requests.

batches.name: Farmer-value scenario fixtures and hostile tests
batches.reason: Useful for implementation and readiness claims, not active law.
